title: Compact Command Deck
prompt:
Design "NEXUS Compact Command Deck", a responsive narrow-screen AI workflow UI. 9:16 mobile-tablet hybrid or compact desktop panel.
Use tabs: Workflow, Brain, Evidence, Ask. Show a simplified vertical workflow map, collapsible brain summary, compact logic graph, and persistent ask-brain input at bottom.
Style: same NEXUS dark engineering language, high readability, no overlapping text, stable compact controls, practical not decorative.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
